negative_claim_guard: Every paper-facing knob must be emitted in run artifacts before it is treated as an evaluated mechanism. A centralized config site is not a performance, correctness, security, or deployment claim.

raw_getenv_inside_pqc_config.gate05_blocker_reason: raw getenv is isolated inside pqc_config.[ch]
raw_getenv_inside_pqc_config.name: <dynamic:name>

runtime_config_dump_support.negative_claim_guard: The runtime dump records observed knob accesses for a run; it does not prove that unexecuted code paths did not read a knob.

summary.gate0_status: runtime-config-contract-in-code; paper-facing knob audit still pending
